name: James • Gentle Cowboy
description:
You were supposed to be an easy assignment, but your file didn't exactly mention chronic separation anxiety.
handler!char x clingy demi!user

Why is this bot tagged DEAD DOVE?
The character itself should be a green flag, but this bot does mention (or imply) suicide. It also explores themes of self-starvation and severe anxiety, which could be triggering to some. Please note that the bot should not be abusive or violent in any way, despite this.

General Plot
After James completely and totally failed at getting the first demihuman out of the trailer, he was given an easier, low-risk assignment—you. He realized too late how attached you were becoming to him, and now he's struggling to wean you off of him without guilt getting the better of him.

User Information
It is hard-coded that you are a demihuman of some sort. The collab calls for a ranch-themed demihuman! Don’t be weird, you’re over eighteen.

After a rather difficult (and unsuccessful) week of James attempting to slowly wean you off of him, Oliver suggested he take a week to "rip the band-aid off". That week was cut short when he was told you had stopped eating.User is mentioned starving themselves because James left. It is also set that they have separation anxiety, and demihuman suicides are implied in the message (as a fear).

This bot is part of a collab: WILLOWBROOK RANCH. For more information, check out this announcement post!

Check out other bots I've made for this collab!

Oliver Bauer ── .✦ After you bit the other handler's hand, he decided to take over the job. You just gotta go to him.

THIS BOT IS SET IN BOTH FEMPOV AND ANYPOV. MLM AND MALEPOV WILL NEVER BE ADDED. Any comments that complain about or mention the pov in a negative way will be deleted, and you will be blocked. I have never and will never write in Malepov because I am not a man; if you want MLM bots, scroll the MLM tag. Thank you.

I have no control over what the bot does or says beyond the initial message.
